keyRisks: COO Priya Nair is the key retention risk and the internal CEO option
Commercial engine under CMO Trevor Hale has been flat for two quarters
New CFO Naomi Okonkwo is only weeks into the seat — impact unproven
portcoSummary.headline: CFO seat just filled (Naomi Okonkwo); commercial engine still flat under Trevor Hale; retaining COO Priya Nair remains the priority pending the Q2 board read.

executives.name: Naomi Okonkwo
indicatorsOfSuccess3to6mo: Stand up a reliable monthly close and rolling forecast
Take over the senior lender relationship

successionShortTerm.successor: None yet — VP Finance to be defined in H2

keyRisks: Only weeks into the seat — durability unproven
executives.additionalComments: Seat filled 2026-05-19 by Naomi Okonkwo, ending a ~5-month CFO vacancy. Prior: SVP Finance at a $400M revenue managed-services platform; led two refinancings. Too early to assess impact; scored green-but-conservative on the at-hire scorecard. directCost ($460K) is an estimate pending comp confirmation.

actionability.recommendation: Onboard and confirm comp/equity; reassess at the Q2 board read

evidence.quote: Naomi is the strongest finance hire we've made across the portfolio this year — she ran FP&A and the lender relationship at a $400M revenue services platform and closed two refinancings.
evidence.speaker: Board Chair

derisicingQuestions: Does the early signal hold once she owns a full close cycle?
suggestedActions: Confirm comp and equity package on file

executives.name: Priya Nair
indicatorsOfSuccess3to6mo: Hold service levels through the leadership turbulence
keyRisks: Flight risk if the CEO situation drags
Only stable senior leader; no internal succession behind her
executives.additionalComments: The steady hand and the most credible internal CEO candidate — the only one operating at the level the thesis needs. Retain at all costs.

actionability.recommendation: Retention package now; position as internal CEO option

evidence.quote: Priya is the only one operating at the level the thesis needs.
evidence.speaker: Deal Team

evidence.quote: If the top doesn't get sorted, Priya is the one I'd worry about losing.
evidence.speaker: Operating Partner

derisicingQuestions: Would she take the CEO seat if offered?
suggestedActions: Put a retention grant in place this month

executives.name: Trevor Hale
indicatorsOfSuccess3to6mo: Show one quarter of net-new growth
executives.whatDroveEVErosion: Commercial engine flat for two quarters; pipeline coverage at 1.4x vs a 3x target. Directly tied to the stalled growth thesis.
keyRisks: No evidence yet of a credible reset plan
executives.additionalComments: Owns the commercial engine central to the growth thesis. Two flat quarters with pipeline coverage at 1.4x vs a 3x target. Underdelivering against the central growth thesis; watch the Q2 read closely.

actionability.recommendation: 30-day plan review; instrument leading indicators before any change

evidence.quote: Coverage is 1.4x. We underwrote a growth story and it isn't showing up.
evidence.speaker: Deal Partner

derisicingQuestions: Is there any leading indicator turning positive?
suggestedActions: Instrument leading indicators of pipeline durability
Reassess at the Q2 board meeting

auditLog.detail: Read executive interview / hiring panel notes

auditLog.reason: Second consecutive flat commercial quarter; pipeline coverage 1.4x vs 3x target

auditLog.detail: Marked CFO as a new hire (seat filled 2026-05-19); impact not yet assessable
Raised flight-risk flag based on operating-partner note
